## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration between GrowthX and Permira's portfolio companies for AI-driven marketing solutions and content creation.](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=86.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation, focusing on B2B companies to improve SEO, GEO, and AI answer visibility](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [Permira seeks 10-15% marketing productivity increase on flat spend for portfolio companies; building CMO community for best practices](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=177.0)
  - [GrowthX's pricing starts at $30K for 8-week strategy sprint, then $15K/month for 12-month growth execution (5 articles/week)](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)
  - [Puneet to explore potential fit with a Permira portfolio company (likely in cybersecurity) whose CMO recently left](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)

## Topics

### Permira's Marketing Initiatives

  - [Value creation team expanding, focusing on specific verticals like marketing](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=118.0)
  - [Two key focus areas:](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=151.0)
    1.  Driving AI use cases for marketing within portfolio
    2.  Embedding marketing efficiencies and setting budget targets (10-15% productivity increase on flat spend)
  - [Launching CMO community to share best practices and new marketing trends](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=214.0)
  - [Approach: Bring in external experts, showcase successful case studies, and deploy across portfolio](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)

### GrowthX's Offerings and Approach

  - [End-to-end partner for SEO/GEO strategy, content creation, and LLM monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=436.0)
  - [AI workflows + expert-in-loop model for scaling quality content](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=535.0)
  - [Focus on B2B clients (95%+) who believe in organic content engines](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=673.0)
  - [Success stories: Town (accounting), Augment Code (AI coding tools), Ramp (spend management)](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=519.0)
  - [Proprietary platform for content creation with deep research integration and fact-checking](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Pricing: $30K-$40K for 8-week strategy sprint, $15K/month for 12-month growth execution](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1240.0)

### Content Creation Process and Quality Assurance

  - [Uses AI workflows with human experts for oversight](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Creates knowledge base and artifacts specific to each client's industry and needs](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=923.0)
  - [Implements rigorous fact-checking and accuracy validation processes](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Offers customizable proofreader checklists and writing guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1077.0)

### Metrics and Reporting

  - [Provides Looker dashboard for content performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)
  - [Measures technical vitals, content activity, citations, rankings, impressions, clicks, and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1386.0)
  - [Uses tools like Scrunch for LLM content performance analysis](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1324.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Tyler to send Puneet the GrowthX deck and video materials for internal discussions](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [Puneet to discuss potential collaboration with a specific portfolio company (likely in cybersecurity)](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
  - [If interested, aim to set up intro sooner rather than later due to GrowthX's current booking status (mid-November)](https://fathom.video/share/9B8xFyhaUu9z1C-x4nB9xZQBzozJSGVG?tab=summary&timestamp=1655.0)
